name: Revolution Cyber Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－サイバー・ドラゴン
desc: If you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only use each of the following effects of "Revolution Cyber Dragon" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Machine Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using this card you control and monsters from your hand or field.
mnst_eff: If you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only use each of the following effects of "Revolution Cyber Dragon" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Machine Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using this card you control and monsters from your hand or field.
eff: If you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only use each of the following effects of "Revolution Cyber Dragon" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Machine Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using this card you control and monsters from your hand or field.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses itself as a Fusion Material
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
